## What is HelpDesk?

HelpDesk is a cloud-based ticketing system developed by LiveChat, Inc. that centralizes customer requests from email, web forms, live chat, and social media into a single queue. It applies AI tools for ticket summarization, text enhancement, and automatic language detection to help support teams move faster with fewer manual steps.

## Who is it for?

HelpDesk serves a broad market — small businesses, growing SaaS companies, IT teams, and ecommerce operations — with a clean interface that doesn't require a specialist to configure. Its 13,000+ customers span retail, nonprofits, and enterprise organizations that want ticketing without the weight of a full-service suite.

## Strengths

- **Simple, predictable pricing** — flat per-user tiers at $29 and $50/month make budgeting straightforward, with no ticket-volume surprises.
- **AI assist built in** — ticket summaries, auto-tagging, and language detection are included at no extra cost on standard plans.
- **Multichannel intake** — email, web forms, live chat, and social media all route into a single ticket view.
- **100+ integrations** — works with common business tools and native integration with LiveChat for seamless chat-to-ticket escalation.
- **GDPR compliance** — data handling and security features are built into the platform, useful for European teams.

## What to consider

- Feature depth is solid for SMBs but may lack advanced customization that larger enterprise teams need.
- Reporting and analytics are functional but not as granular as more mature platforms.
- The product leans on its LiveChat sibling for chat capabilities, so teams not using LiveChat may find the chat integration less seamless.

## Bottom line

HelpDesk is a clean, affordable ticketing system that covers the fundamentals well and adds useful AI without extra cost. It suits teams that want to move past inbox chaos quickly and don't need the complexity of Zendesk or Freshdesk. Evaluate alongside Help Scout and Groove for an honest comparison at a similar price point.
